title: Xenial Roasted German Chive Roast
description: A hearty, earthy German dish featuring Asian chives and a delicious roast, perfect for a lazy Sunday, this lacto-vegetarian friendly meal is sure to satisfy. The combination of flavors and textures creates a truly unique taste experience.

ingredients.name: beef roast
ingredients.notes: such as top round or rump roast

instructions: Preheat the oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the beef roast with salt and black pepper.
Heat the oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Sear the beef roast until browned on all sides, then set aside.
Add the chopped onion to the pot and cook until softened.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the chopped carrots and potatoes to the pot, stirring to combine.
Return the beef roast to the pot and add the vegetable broth.
Cover the pot and transfer to the preheated oven.
Roast for 2 1/2 hours, or until the beef is tender and the vegetables are cooked through.
Stir in the chopped Asian chives and serve hot.
